name: Amy Oh's Very Best Cookies
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Firmly packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a bowl, whisk together flour, baking soda, and salt.
3. In a large bowl with an electric mixer, beat together butter, brown sugar, and granulated sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Beat in egg and vanilla until combined well.
5. Gradually beat in the flour mixture and oats until combined well.
6. Stir in raisins and chocolate chips.
7. Drop dough by rounded tablespoons about 2 inches apart onto ungreased baking sheets.
8. Bake in the middle of the oven for about 11 minutes, or until golden.
9. Transfer cookies to racks to cool.
Makes about 36 cookies.
